pi_items.source: Confirmed by setup_task.sh which copies the sample to this path.
Confirmed by setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which check this exact path.
Confirmed by task description and export_result.sh.
Confirmed by task description and verifier.py logic.
Contradicted by verifier.py which explicitly overrides the value to 20 because images are downscaled to 400x400 thumbnails in export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real OpenToonz sample scene ('dwanko_run.tnz'). The scene is copied to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz' and must be rendered to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/recolor'. The target recoloring is #FF6600 (RGB: 255, 102, 0). The evaluation checks for at least 20 rendered frames containing a minimum of 20 pixels of the target color in 400x400 downscaled images, rather than the 500 pixels claimed in metadata.
